title: The Crew Breaks Hody’s Army
description: On pages 19–19, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Zoro. The core beat is the crew breaks hody’s army.
scene: The scene follows the crew breaks hody’s army, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You played me for a fool, Vander Decken!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But this is just what I needed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sanji, wait!! I'm going up there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys stay and take care of things here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right!! But listen, luffy!! That ship is outside, in the water!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it full of water on the inside too, jimbei?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot say... but decken is a fruit user himself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There must be enough dry space inside for him to move about freely!! If you're going up there, take this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's a coral that produces bubbles.

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: My beloved Shirahoshii- chan is in your hands, so don't go screwing up!!!

summary: The Crew Breaks Hody’s Army. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
